title: A Buyer Just Asked for 5×7 — Fix It in 8 Seconds With Quick Export
caption:
A buyer just DM'd asking for 5×7.

Here's how to add it before they leave:

1. Open SnapToSize Quick Export
2. Upload your artwork
3. Select 5×7 (5:7 ratio)
4. Download — 300 DPI, correctly named, Etsy-ready

One missing size. Fixed in 8 seconds. No full pack needed.

Link in bio -> app.snaptosize.com
